    Profile

    Welcome! ✨

    I’m DoYun Park, a graduate student at Graduate School of AI Semiconductor, KAIST.
    My focus is on two areas 1) Wireless and Wearable Biomedical Systems and 2) Human-Computer Interaction with AI for Accessibility.
    I’m particularly interested in:
    • Designing wearables that fit seamlessly into people’s real lives • Sensing and understanding people through their physiology and context
    • Bridging the gap in how people communicate with AI and each other



    👣 You can find my CV here
    📧 You can reach me via email: donext@kaist.ac.kr or linkedin

    Education

    • Ph.D. Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Techology (KAIST) - Daejeon, South Korea (Sep.2024 - Current)
      • Major: Graduate School of AI Semiconductor (School of Electrical Engineering)
      • Advisor: Prof. Kyeongha Kwon
    • M.S. Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Techology (KAIST) - Daejeon, South Korea (Sep.2022 - Aug. 2024)
      • Major: School of Electrical Engineering
      • Advisor: Prof. Kyeongha Kwon
    • B.S. Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Techology (KAIST) - Daejeon, South Korea (Mar.2017 - Aug.2022)
      • Major: School of Electrical Engineering

    Latest News!!

    🏆 Won 2nd place at the 2026 KAIST Open Source Hackathon 301! This was my first hackathon! 26.06.04
    🏆 Won 3rd place at the Assistive Technology Idea Contest! This was my first contest! 25.11.06
    📃 Our paper was accepted in Nature Communications - I contributed as a co-first author! 25.06.09 View abstract
    📃 Our review paper was published in Advanced Electronic Materials - I contirbuted as a first author! 25.06.27 View abstract

    Contact me
